{{Infobox character
| name = Teranon
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|analysis spells}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, manifest an orange-ish magic circle over his eye to examine data}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Archmage]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, advisor}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Benri's team}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|mentor}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, advisor}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Teranon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Teranon is a veteran [[Archmage]] and an elderly half-Aethril characterized by gray, star-speckled hair and skin with a subtle blue tint. He has served as a long-term mentor to [[Benri]] and has been associated with the [[Vallenar Corporation]] for many decades. Within his professional capacity, he possesses significant seniority and expertise in magical disciplines, including the use of divination, telekinesis, and vision-based spells. His responsibilities involve managing magical preparations, overseeing investigation teams, and analyzing data through [[Aetheric symbols]] or specialized magic circles. Teranon has also been involved in addressing serious matters such as potential treaty violations involving [[World Spirits]].}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Teranon]] is a wise man and a longtime [[Archmage]] who was one of [[Benri]]'s mentors.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2">''The Captain'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Teranon]] is a visibly aged half-Aethril with lights that sparkle like stars in his hair.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Teranon]] is a character who interacts with [[Benri]] and [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Teranon]] performs analysis spells.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Teranon]] is a half-Aethril and an advisor to [[Benri Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Teranon]] is a member of [[Benri]]'s team.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|As a friend and magical mentor to [[Benri]], Teranon serves as an expert in his field rather than a leader. His gray hair possesses a unique sparkle derived from his half-Aethril heritage, and he has the ability to manifest an orange magic circle over his eye to examine data. During a later interaction, [[Benri]] borrowed a spell from him and spoke with Teranon before a call concluded. At this time, Teranon remained unaware of the [[life]]-saving clone measure [[Benri]] had implemented.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] is [[Benri]]'s friend.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] was one of [[Benri]]'s magical mentors.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] is an expert but not a leader.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] has gray hair that sparkles with the stars of a half-Aethril.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] can manifest an orange-ish magic circle over his eye to examine data.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri]] borrowed a spell from [[Teranon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] spoke to [[Benri]] before the call ended.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Teranon]] was unaware of [[Benri]]'s [[life]]-saving clone measure.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“You think you got him?” Teranon asked bitterly.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You shouldn’t have called me, Ben,” Teranon sighed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
